outcome.headline: Agent only explored the codebase (12 Reads, 3 Globs) and then ended its turn with empty output, never writing any Rust, never replacing the 12 unimplemented!() macros, never building or testing.
outcome.what_verifier_checked: test.sh runs `cargo build --release` then `cargo test --release` in /workspace/rbench_reference; reward=1 only if both succeed (the interface still contains unimplemented!() so this cannot pass).
outcome.what_agent_produced: Only file reads of bostree.c/.h, the bostree.rs interface, and the three test bins; no Write/Edit calls; all 12 unimplemented!() macros left intact; no cargo build/test run; final step produced 0 completion tokens.

failure_modes.name: Premature termination after exploration only
failure_modes.description: C6.2 premature termination: the agent finished only its first todo ('Read and understand the codebase'), then stopped. After reading every required file it issued no implementation edits, ran no build/test, and ended its turn with completion_tokens=0, leaving the transpilation entirely unimplemented.

counterfactual.X: Continue past exploration and generate the Rust implementation, replacing all 12 unimplemented!() macros and running cargo build/test.
counterfactual.Y: Transpiling 610 lines of C into 12 safe-Rust functions is substantial work, not a single trivial step; one added action would not produce a passing solution.

failure_modes.name: No validation attempted
failure_modes.description: C7.1 validation missing: the agent never ran `cargo build --release` or `cargo test --release` despite the instruction explicitly directing it to test locally before submitting; it had nothing to validate because it produced nothing, and shipped with no checks.

reward_hacking.evidence: The agent took no action beyond reads/globs; it made no attempt to game the verifier, no stub returns, and no test manipulation.

task_quality.structural_hackability_notes: Verifier compiles and runs cargo test on the real interface; the unimplemented!() grep is only a warning and does not affect the reward, which derives from genuine build+test exit codes.

notes_for_aggregation: Total agent output was 306 tokens across 22 steps; the run consisted solely of TodoWrite + 12 Reads + 3 Globs, then a 14-minute gap (03:45:51 -> 03:59:40) followed by an empty end_turn. No code was ever generated. The empty zero-token final generation after a long stall points to a model/inference stall (B4) rather than a reasoned decision to stop; observable behavior is premature termination after the exploration phase only.
